title: Tehno Magic Horror VR
description: This assembly was created in order to immerse you in the world of Minecraft with minimal inconvenience.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79b6d9432dcf45d80bef951a49808b9f54cb9da1.png)


this assembly has 3 variations:

- The standart
one includes 191 mods
minimum RTX 3060TI card.
- The small
one includes 151 mods
minimal RTX 2060 super card
cut-out decor and some graphics mods.
- The mini
includes 118 mods
the minimum GTX 1660 super map
all mods except gameplay and optimization are cut out

**The minimum graphics cards are chosen approximately and may not correspond to reality.**

basic mods:

tech:
- Creat
- Tech Reborn

magic:
Hex Casting
- Hexalia
- Wizards rpg
- Botania

horror:
- Better Cave Dweller
- Cave Dweller Evolved (Fabric)
- The Man From The Fog - Fabric
- Nyctophobia Dread
- Sleepless
